name: Kahlua Swirl Fudge
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Almond Bark or Vanilla-Flavored Candy Coating (coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch square pan with foil, extending over the sides of the pan. Butter the foil.
2. In a large saucepan, combine sugar, margarine, and evaporated milk. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly; remove from heat.
4. Add marshmallow creme; stir until smooth.
5. Pour 1 cup of the marshmallow mixture into a small bowl. Add almond bark and strong coffee; stir until smooth. Set aside.
6. To the remaining marshmallow mixture, add chocolate chips; stir until smooth. Stir in nuts and liqueur until well blended.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan. Spread almond bark mixture on top of the chocolate mixture.
8. Using a spatula, swirl for a marbled effect.
9. Cool to room temperature.
10. Score fudge into 36 squares. Top each square with Chocolate-Dipped Nuts.
11. Refrigerate until firm. Remove fudge from pan by lifting the foil; remove foil from fudge.
12. Using a large knife, cut through the scored lines. Store in refrigerator. Makes 2 lbs. 12 oz.
TIP: To prepare 1 tablespoon double-strength coffee, dissolve 1/2 teaspoon instant coffee granules in 1 tablespoon hot water.
RECIPE IN THIS DATABASE.
CHOCOLATE FUDGE: Prepare recipe as directed up to . Omit almond bark, coffee, and liqueur. Substitute 12 oz semi-sweet chocolate chips for 6 oz of chocolate chips; add to marshmallow mixture; stir until smooth. Stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla and nuts. Pour into prepared pan. Cool to room temperature. Continue as directed above. THIS RECIPE WILL BE CONTINUED...
